name: Bright Data
description: Industrial-grade web data platform: Web Unlocker (scrape any site through their proxy + CAPTCHA-solving stack), SERP API (Google/Bing/etc structured), and Dataset API (pre-built scrapers for LinkedIn, Crunchbase, Indeed, Google Maps, Amazon, etc — ~437 collectors). Best fallback for sites Firecrawl can't crack.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API token
credential_fields.description: Bright Data API token from brightdata.com → Account Settings → API Tokens

tools.name: web_unlocker
tools.description: Fetch any URL through Bright Data's anti-bot proxy stack. Handles CAPTCHA, JS rendering, fingerprinting. Returns raw HTML (or JSON).

zone.description: Your Web Unlocker zone name (configured in the Bright Data dashboard)

country.description: 2-letter country code for the egress proxy

tools.name: serp_search
tools.description: Structured SERP results from Google/Bing/Yandex/DuckDuckGo via Bright Data's SERP API. Pass a Google search URL.

tools.name: dataset_trigger
tools.description: Trigger a pre-built scraper (dataset) for a given input list. Examples of dataset_id: 'gd_l1viktl72bvl7bjuj0' (LinkedIn profiles), 'gd_lpfll7v5hcqtkxl6l' (LinkedIn jobs), 'gd_l1vikfnt1wgvvqz95w' (Crunchbase), 'gd_lk5ns7kz21pck8jpis' (Google Maps). Returns a snapshot_id — poll dataset_snapshot.

dataset_id.description: Dataset/collector id, e.g. 'gd_l1viktl72bvl7bjuj0' for LinkedIn profiles

input.description: Array of input rows. Schema varies per dataset — most accept { url } or { name, location } objects.

tools.name: dataset_snapshot
tools.description: Poll a dataset trigger by snapshot_id. Returns status + records once ready.
